news.title: I’m 30 and haven’t paid my dad for my cellphone bill for a year. He charged me $975. Is that fair?

news.title: Trump gets the blame as investors snub Iran pause. Even Truth Social posts may not save stocks.
news.title_cn: 由於投資人冷落伊朗暫停，川普受到指責。即使是「真相社交」貼文也可能無法挽救股票。
